description: A PUSH with an event-hash STALE_AT MUST be silently discarded after a CAST to the matching topic is received; no NUDGE MUST be sent even with REQUIRES_ACK
normative_ref: spec/04-semantic-expiry.md § Expiry Types (10 — Event Hash); CAST and Ephemeral Broadcasts
notes: The CAST is sent immediately after the PUSH. This relies on the implementation processing packets in order. Implementations that process packets asynchronously may ACK the PUSH before handling the CAST; such implementations SHOULD document this limitation. Event-hash STALE_AT is optional at Level 1–2 but MUST be supported at Level 3.

steps.comment: STALE_AT type=10: stale when topic 'conformance.test.reset' is CASTed.
Immediately CAST the topic that invalidates the PUSH above.
No NUDGE MUST be sent. The PUSH was invalidated by the matching CAST (spec §10 — Event Hash).
